title: achnatherum hendersonii
intro: Achnatherum hendersonii, also known as Henderson's needle grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the grass family, Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Achnatherum hendersonii include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be applied topically to the skin or ingested orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
